comparators.version: official release and model card dated 2026-07-15
comparators.code: provider-listed Transformers, SGLang, vLLM, TokenSpeed, Unsloth, and llama.cpp integrations
comparators.dataset_and_split: provider benchmark suite at effort=0.99; exact private/internal harness components not fully public
comparators.hardware: BF16 at least 2 TB aggregate VRAM; NVFP4 at least 600 GB aggregate VRAM
comparators.uncertainty_method: reproduce each public metric within max(2.0 percentage points, reported or binomial 95% interval) only on the exact public harness; otherwise blocker
comparators.blocker: The 16 GB Apple M1 host has no supported NVIDIA cluster and only 116 GiB free disk, below even the 600 GB NVFP4 VRAM floor; API access cannot expose matched weights, internal state, energy, or component ablations.

comparators.paper_or_model: Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention
comparators.weights: paper-scale 1.3B checkpoints not established as an immutable official release in this audit
comparators.dataset_and_split: paper-reported 100B FineWeb-Edu training plus downstream language, commonsense, retrieval, and RULER evaluations
comparators.hardware: official optimized PyTorch/Triton/CUDA path; exact paper hardware must be recovered before reproduction
comparators.budget: unavailable locally; no CUDA accelerator or cloud-spend authority
comparators.uncertainty_method: exact paper seed protocol and confidence method, or at least five matched seeds with bootstrap 95% intervals, fixed before any ASI Stack comparison
comparators.blocker: The strongest reported comparator displaced Mamba-3 during the dated scan, but the local host lacks the CUDA hardware and training budget required to reproduce its 1.3B/100B-token envelope.

comparators.weights: no immutable official end-to-end Mamba-3 language-model checkpoint identified in the official repository at the refresh boundary
comparators.dataset_and_split: paper retrieval, state-tracking, language-modeling, and downstream setups; exact official reproduction configuration required
comparators.hardware: official core requires Linux; reported GPU path requires NVIDIA and CUDA 11.6+
comparators.budget: unavailable locally; no compatible accelerator or cloud-spend authority
comparators.uncertainty_method: reproduce the reported average within 0.3 percentage points and every named state/retrieval gate under the paper seed protocol before comparison
comparators.blocker: The host is macOS on Apple M1 with no NVIDIA/CUDA path, and the official repository does not provide a frozen end-to-end Mamba-3 checkpoint sufficient to reproduce the paper result.

comparators.paper_or_model: Less is More: Recursive Reasoning with Tiny Networks
comparators.weights: no official release artifact identified; training from source is the documented route
comparators.dataset_and_split: Sudoku-Extreme, Maze-Hard, ARC-AGI-1, and ARC-AGI-2 with the repository's augmentation and split warnings
comparators.hardware: smallest documented run assumes one L40S with 48 GB VRAM for about 18–20 hours; ARC runs assume four H100 GPUs for about three days
comparators.budget: unavailable locally; no CUDA accelerator or cloud-spend authority
comparators.uncertainty_method: Sudoku 87% plus or minus 2 points and the paper ARC results within a predeclared 2-point absolute range, with canonical single-pass and matched vote views
comparators.blocker: The archived official repository exposes no release checkpoint, and its smallest documented training run requires a 48 GB CUDA GPU versus the local 16 GB non-CUDA host.

comparators.version: official repository HEAD at refresh boundary
comparators.weights: domain-specific learned recognition components generated by experiment
comparators.dataset_and_split: official text, list, logo, tower, and other domain experiments; no shared natural-work Cognitive Kernel ABI split exists
comparators.hardware: legacy multi-language, submodule, OCaml, Rust, Python, and optional Singularity stack
comparators.budget: a mechanism proxy may be locally possible, but no matched OneCell or ABI candidate exists to compare
comparators.uncertainty_method: exact official task-set replay plus at least five seeds and bootstrap 95% intervals before any cross-system comparison
comparators.blocker: Running DreamCoder alone would be a weaker isolated reproduction, not the frozen heterogeneous ABI or OneCell comparison; the required candidate, common workloads, adapters, and total-cost instrumentation do not exist.
